title: Add collapsible comment history with toggle link and reposition submit/cancel buttons

requirements.text: Add a 'History' link with an icon positioned opposite the existing 'Comments' label in the ActivitySection component

quotes: add a link opposite the existing 'comments' to access the comment history section

acceptanceCriteria: History link appears on the same row as the 'Comments' label
Link includes a recognizable history icon
Link is clickable and toggles comment history visibility

requirements.text: Make the comment history section in ActivitySection visible only when the history link is clicked, implementing a toggle state

quotes: make the comment history section visible only when you click the history link with the icon

acceptanceCriteria: Comment history is initially hidden by default
Clicking the history link shows the comment history
Clicking again hides the comment history
Visual indicator shows whether history is expanded or collapsed

requirements.text: Move the submit and cancel button section in the phone screen to appear below the document section in the case detail layout

quotes: move the submit and cancel section within the phone screen below the document section

acceptanceCriteria: Submit and cancel buttons render after the DocumentsSection component
Layout maintains proper spacing and alignment within the PhoneMockup
Buttons remain accessible and functional in their new position

constraints: Maintain the existing compact layout optimized for phone screens
Preserve all existing functionality of the ActivitySection and DocumentsSection components
Keep the PhoneMockup scrolling behavior intact
nonGoals: Changing the styling or layout of the comment history content itself
Altering the behavior of submit and cancel buttons beyond repositioning
